summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mission Control dashboard - all backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly
passed_tests: Backend: All 16 API endpoints (brands, stats, approvals, agents, tasks, inboxes, activity, seed)
Backend: Brand filtering across all endpoints
Backend: CRUD operations (create task, approve/discard items, complete tasks)
Frontend: Dashboard loading with all 8 brands + 'All Brands'
Frontend: Navigation between all views (Overview, Approvals, Agents, Tasks, Inboxes, Activity)
Frontend: Brand filtering with topbar updates
Frontend: Approval actions (approve/discard) with item removal
Frontend: New Task dialog creation and submission
Frontend: Stats row with 4 stat cards displaying correct data
Frontend: Activity feed with real-time updates
Frontend: All interactive elements clickable and responsive
Integration: Real-time data updates and persistence
Design: Editorial aesthetic with proper typography and colors
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all features working)
